creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/bad.html

the port games/heretic has unfetchable distfiles.  I did some looking
around and found the it has a new site.  The patch below fixes the MASTER_SITE
and WWW.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN
From : /usr/ports/
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/heretic.diff
